headline: Citizens Financial Analysts Raise Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) reported better-than-expected earnings for Q1, with EPS of $1.13 and sales of $2.168B. Analysts raised price targets.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Gerard Cassidy   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $67 to $70.

headline: KBW's Chris McGratty shares his take on multiple bank stocks
summary: Chris McGratty, KBW head of U.S. bank research, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss his take on earnings from the banking sector, how he would position banks in a portfolio, his outlook for select bank stocks, and more.

headline: CFG Q1 CY2026 Deep Dive: Strategic Initiatives and Private Banking Drive Growth Amid Uncertainty
summary: Regional banking company Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 12% year on year to $2.17 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.13 per share was 4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
